Issue: does not specify integration with external security systems.
Suggestion: "The security system shall be capable of integrating with existing home security systems via standard communication protocols."

Issue: does not include safety measures of children or disabled individuals
Suggestion: "The system shall provide child safety locks and alerts for appliances to prevent accidental activation."

Issue: does not specify encryption standards for data transmission.
Suggestion: "All data transmitted between the DH system and external devices shall be encrypted using AES-256 encryption."

Issue: does not specify procedures for software updates and patches.
Suggestion: "The system shall support automatic software updates and patches, with user notifications and options to schedule updates."

Issue: does not detail  user privacy and data ownership.
Suggestion: "Users shall retain ownership of their data, and the system shall provide options to export or delete their data upon request."
